title: Largest Positive Integer That Exists With Its Negative
titleCn: 与对应负数同时存在的最大正整数

testcases.input: nums = [-1,2,-3,3] Output: 3 Explanation: 3 is the only valid k we can find in the array.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: 3 is the only valid k we can find in the array.

testcases.input: nums = [-1,10,6,7,-7,1] Output: 7 Explanation: Both 1 and 7 have their corresponding negative values in the array. 7 has a larger value.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: Both 1 and 7 have their corresponding negative values in the array. 7 has a larger value.

testcases.input: nums = [-10,8,6,7,-2,-3] Output: -1 Explanation: There is no a single valid k, we return -1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There is no a single valid k, we return -1.
